project.name: 时光邮局
project.styleDefinitionBrief: Warm nostalgic dark-tone single-page site: deep brown primary (#2C2420), warm gold accent (#C4956A), cream text (#F7F3EE). Glass-morphism cards with glow borders, noise texture background, serif display font for emotional warmth. Post office / letter / memory theme with cute mailman character.
project.designRead: emotional product landing / memory-conscious individuals / warm nostalgic trust / medium density / avoid neon and cold blue tones

colorSystem.primaryColorRole: deep brown warm (#2C2420) as primary background, warm gold (#C4956A) as accent for CTAs and highlights
colorSystem.brandHuePolicy: single warm brand palette; no secondary or accent brand hue

styleContinuityAnchors.shapeSystem: rounded-lg (12px) cards, rounded-full buttons, warm soft shapes
styleContinuityAnchors.typographySystem: Georgia/Noto Serif SC for display headings; system sans-serif for body
styleContinuityAnchors.spacingSystem: generous vertical rhythm (4xl/6rem section spacing), comfortable padding
styleContinuityAnchors.componentLanguage: glass-morphism cards with top-glow border, pill-shaped buttons
styleContinuityAnchors.surfaceAndDepth: glass-morphism with backdrop-filter blur, subtle noise texture overlay
styleContinuityAnchors.imageryAndIconography: warm-toned illustrations, nostalgic photography, cute character design
styleContinuityAnchors.interactionTone: gentle hover glow, spring click feedback, typewriter text effect

designSource.designDecisionSummary: Deep brown warm dark theme with gold accent, glass-morphism cards, noise texture, serif headings

pages.title: 时光邮局
pages.businessScenario: Emotional memory product single-page site with hero, features, flow, gallery, and about sections
pages.visualNorthStar: Warm nostalgic landing: deep brown noise texture background, glowing glass cards, cute mailman character greeting visitors, golden accent highlights guiding the eye through memory-themed sections
pages.compositionPattern: Vertical narrative scroll: Hero → Feature trio → Process steps → Memory gallery → About story

assets.semanticDescription: Warm nostalgic post office interior with golden light, old wooden desk, scattered letters and envelopes
3D chibi-style cute mailman character with white cotton-candy face, black dot eyes, dark blue uniform, orange scarf, brown mailbag
Warm-toned photo of a person gently placing a polaroid photo into an envelope at a wooden desk
Small cute mailman character sitting next to a stack of letters, warm lighting, cozy atmosphere
Open vintage wooden box revealing glowing polaroid memories scattered with warm golden sparkles
